message:
bd-3gyn2 bd-2wds9: lock ordering enforcement + watch waker dedup fix

Lock ordering (bd-3gyn2):
- Enhanced LockShard with label(), Display, lock_order query fns
- Added ShardGuard::regions_only() and obligations_only()
- Detailed violation messages in debug_assert
- 23 new tests (violation, tracking, valid sequences, concurrent)

Watch channel bug fix (bd-2wds9 audit):
- Fixed unbounded waker growth: register_waker() pushed a new Waker
  on every poll without deduplication. Added Arc<AtomicBool>-based
  WatchWaiter matching the mpsc/broadcast dedup pattern.
- Fixed misleading receiver_count comment
- 2 new regression tests

VirtualTcp (from prior session):
- Added Drop impl for clean shutdown signaling
- Added eof_on_drop test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
